prompt:
Goal: Create a luxurious vertical beauty campaign advertisement for popcraft.ai, styled like a high-end skincare editorial.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition, warm cream and blush palette, soft diffused daylight, glossy reflective tabletop, elegant fashion-magazine lighting.

Layout: Place a glamorous young woman on the left half, seated at a vanity in front of sheer cream curtains. Her face is covered by a centered opaque soft-brown square censor block, while her long wavy brunette hair, bare shoulder, pearl-and-gold necklaces, dangling floral earrings, and champagne-pink satin robe remain visible. Place the product lineup across the lower center and right foreground on clear acrylic risers. Put the main headline and brand mark in the upper right.

Text content: Top right small orange icon plus brand text: popcraft.ai. Large elegant serif headline in dusty rose: RADIANCE REFINED. BEAUTY DEFINED.. Below it, a small floral divider icon. Subheadline in spaced serif caps: LUXURY SKINCARE, CRAFTED FOR YOU.. Tiny supporting copy beneath: Advanced Care. Timeless Glow. Unveil Your Most Radiant Skin..

Product details: Show exactly 6 visible skincare products, each with minimalist popcraft.ai branding and small orange logo: 1 low round gold cream jar at front left labeled “LA CRÈME”; 2 tall white squeeze tube with gold cap near center labeled “LA MOUSSE DOUCE NETTOYANTE”; 3 tall frosted ivory lotion bottle with rounded reflective gold cap labeled “LA LOTION”; 4 small low round gold jar at front center labeled “LE BAUME”; 5 tall reflective metallic gold serum bottle at right-center labeled “SÉRUM”; 6 oval clear-and-gold bottle at far right labeled “L’ESSENCE DE BEAUTÉ”. Add one small gold-and-white cosmetic spatula or applicator lying near the front.

Set dressing: Include blush-pink roses and cream flowers in the lower left and soft floral blur in the background right, strands of white pearls draped across the tabletop, a faceted crystal glass at lower left, transparent acrylic display blocks, and warm gold reflections.

Visual style: Ultra-polished photorealistic luxury skincare ad, shallow depth of field, creamy highlights, soft bokeh, rose-gold accents, refined feminine atmosphere, premium editorial beauty campaign aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the composition clean and upscale, maintain exactly 6 main products, preserve readable headline hierarchy, avoid extra products or extra text, no harsh shadows, no clutter.
